task: Show me the rules and cancellation for Alley Spring.
final_result_response:
I now have all the complete information. Let me provide this as the final answer.

Here are the **Rules & Cancellations for Alley Spring** (Ozark National Scenic Riverways, Near Eminence, Missouri):

---

## Reservation Rules

| Rule Name | Description | When? |
|---|---|---|
| **Maximum Consecutive Stay** | You may stay up to 14 nights during a visit at this campground. | 06/11/2007 - 12/31/2050 |
| **Maximum Stay** | You may stay up to 14 nights total at this campground within rolling 30 days. | 08/01/2018 - 12/31/2024 |
| **Maximum Reservations per Transaction** | You may pay for up to 4 reservations at one time within the same credit card transaction. | All Year |
| **Self Service Modifications After Arrival Allowed** | You can modify your reservation through your online account (My Reservations), including changing sites or leaving early. Past nights can't be changed. | All Year |

---

## Changes
- If your new stay dates are completely different from the original, there is a **$10 change fee** (per reserved site).
- **No additional fees** for adding/removing nights or changing to a different campsite.
- Balances adjust based on the new stay's nightly rate.

---

## Cancellations
You can cancel any time before your scheduled arrival. You'll receive a refund **minus**:
- **$10 cancellation fee**
- Any reservation fees (only if paid when booking)
- Any previous change fees

### Late Cancellation
- **Individual campsites**: A late cancellation applies starting from midnight **1 calendar day** before your scheduled check-in.
- **Cabins and group sites**: A late cancellation applies starting from midnight **14 calendar days or fewer** before your scheduled check-in.

### Late Fee
A late cancellation will also subtract your **first night's recreation use fee** from any refund owed.

---

## Day Use Rules
The above modification/cancellation/refund guidance **does not apply** to Day Use sites. Day Use sites forfeit the Day Use recreation use fee if cancelled less than 14 days before the arrival date (not to exceed the total paid for the original reservation).
